/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="search" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=12;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1F5EE;strokeColor=#0F6E56;strokeWidth=0.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;shadow=1;" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a_loop_dec" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#73726C;strokeWidth=1.5;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="decision" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="340" y="496" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decision" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAEEDA;strokeColor=#854F0B;strokeWidth=0.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;shadow=1;" value="<b style="font-size:16px;color:#633806;">Decision point</b><br><span style="font-size:14px;color:#854F0B;">Low risk and clear intent?</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="300" x="190" y="532" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="autonomous" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=15;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1F5EE;strokeColor=#0F6E56;strokeWidth=0.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;shadow=1;" value="<b style="font-size:16px;color:#085041;">Autonomous action</b><br><span style="font-size:14px;color:#0F6E56;">Applies fix, runs tests</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="176" x="402" y="644" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="escalate" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=15;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAEEE7;strokeColor=#993C1D;strokeWidth=0.5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;shadow=1;" value="<b style="font-size:16px;color:#712B13;">Escalate to engineer</b><br><span style="font-size:14px;color:#993C1D;">Asks for clarification</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="176" x="102" y="644" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yesArrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#3D3D3A;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;flowAnimation=1;shadow=1;" target="autonomous" value="<b>Yes</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0188" y="-3" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="340" y="620" /> <mxPoint x="490" y="620" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="noArrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;html=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#3D3D3A;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;flowAnimation=1;shadow=1;" target="escalate" value="<b>No</b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="340" y="620" /> <mxPoint x="190" y="620" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
